requiredEvidence.description: Separate source-writing specification that names generated families, runtime roots, conflict policy, rollback and verification commands.
Human approval of resources/generated/admin-scaffold-promotion-review.json after reviewing generated hashes and target-family mappings.
Review evidence for every runtime source file that would be created or overwritten by generated output.
Rollback steps for reverting generated runtime source writes and regenerated artifacts without damaging handwritten code.
Captured output for every target family test command declared in this readiness contract.
Approval from each runtime target root owner before generated files can be promoted into that root.

prohibitedEvidence: runtime mutation enabled in review packet

roots.purpose: Future generated GORM model package; not an active runtime package until promoted by a separate source-writing spec.
Future generated repository package; current runtime repositories stay behind existing platform storage/adminresource adapters.
Existing Gin HTTP API package; source-writing route promotion requires explicit route ownership and tests.
Existing admin resource engine package; generated code must not bypass schema/query/data-scope contracts.
Existing admin resource frontend package; generated pages must keep Refine and platform UI wrappers.
Existing Refine integration package; generated source must preserve provider contracts.

reasons: Generated scaffold files are review artifacts, not runtime source changes.
Each target family must pass its mapped test commands before any future promotion.
Human review and diff review remain required before enabling source-writing generation.

targetFamilies.purpose: Future GORM model source promotion from generated model drafts.
Future repository source promotion from generated repository drafts.
Future Gin route source promotion from generated route drafts.
Future Refine admin resource source promotion from generated page drafts.
Future contract test source promotion from generated test drafts.
